lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Sidewinder ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Sidewinder Mk I
sources.what: Ship-specific stats, hardpoint & internal layout, and shipyard pricing.

sources.label: Fandom — Sidewinder
sources.what: Faulcon DeLacy lore, starter-ship role, and the ship's spec reference.

sources.label: YouTube — Down to Earth Astronomy
sources.what: Livestream build outfitting a Sidewinder as an anti-Xeno combat ship, walking through fitting choices for AX engagements.
